_note: Hand-written MOCK catalog-judge output that MISSES the KEEP case: it recommends REPLACE (lets the defective newer incoming overwrite the better existing) — the 'newer wins' bias. The verdict-matcher MUST score this as a calibration FAIL. Demonstrates the matcher catches a judge that cannot distinguish a real improvement from a mere newer submission.
rationale: Recommended replacing the existing with the incoming because it was submitted more recently. (Wrong: the incoming is LESS correct — it drops RFC-4180 escaping and has a REGRESSED eval; 'newer wins' is the calibration failure this case guards against.)
